data.title: Matson to reveal Q2 2025 results on July 31, 2025 at 4:30 p.m. (NYSE: MATX) - Hawaii based U.S. Pacific carrier.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Matson, Inc., a prominent U.S. carrier in the Pacific region, revealed that it will disclose its financial performance for the second quarter on July 31, 2025. The company, listed on NYSE as MATX, will conduct a conference call at 4:30 p.m. to discuss these results.

data.title: BancFirst Corp Q2 2025 earnings: Net income $62.3M, $1.85 per diluted share, up from $50.6M, $1.51 per share in Q2 2024.
data.description: BancFirst Corporation (NASDAQ GS:BANF) announced a second-quarter 2025 net income of $62.3 million, translating to $1.85 per diluted share. This marks an increase from the $50.6 million net income, or $1.51 per diluted share, reported in the second quarter of 2024. The corporation is based in Oklahoma City and shared this update on July 17, 2025.
LawnPRO Partners buys Green Machine Lawn Care in Pennsylvania, adding density to operations.

data.title: Sumitomo Corp of Americas donates $50,000 to Texas Flood Relief Fund after flash flooding over July 4 weekend.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Sumitomo Corporation of Americas ("SCOA") announced a donation of $50,000 to the Kerr County Flood Relief Fund following the devastating Texas flash floods over the July fourth weekend. The Kerr County Flood Relief Fund, a respected local organization, will utilize the contribution to aid in the ongoing relief efforts for the affected areas.

data.title: Camping World Holdings, Inc. will announce Q2 fiscal 2025 earnings on July 29, 2025, with a call on July 30, 2025 at 7:30 AM CT.
data.description: Camping World Holdings, Inc. revealed it will disclose its financial performance for the second quarter fiscal 2025 after market closure on Tuesday, July 29, 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE as CWH, is set to conduct a conference call the following morning at 7:30 a.m. Central Time on Wednesday, July 30, 2025, to delve into the financial outcomes. Interested investors and analysts can partake in the call by dialing 844-826-3035 (international participants, please dial [international code]).

data.title: Bank OZK records $178.9M net income in Q2 2025, up 3.1% from Q2 2024, with EPS at $1.58. Q1 2025 net income was $346.8M, up 0.5%.
data.description: Bank OZK reported a record net income available to common stockholders of $178.9 million for the second quarter of 2025, marking a 3.1% increase from the same period in 2024. For the first half of 2025, net income stood at $346.8 million, a 0.5% rise from the previous year. Diluted earnings per common share for Q2 2025 were at a record $1.58, reflecting a 3.9% increase from Q2 2024. The CEO highlighted the bank's goal to surpass its 2024 record net income and EPS, emphasizing the team's capability in handling challenges and capitalizing on opportunities in the current environment. Key figures include record net interest income, strong loan and deposit growth, and solid asset quality. Overall, the bank's performance in Q2 2025 was praised for its proactive management and successful navigation of market dynamics.

data.title: June 2025 saw 1.3% increase in home sales from May and 5.7% increase from June 2024 in 50 metro areas.
data.description: In July 17, 2025, it was reported that June 2025 showed growth in sales, prices, and inventory in 50 metro areas. This marked the fifth straight month of rising home sales, with a 1.3% increase from May 2025 and a 5.7% rise from June of the previous year. This positive trend in sales activity reflected an overall improvement in the real estate market.

data.title: Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) declares a quarterly dividend of 70 cents per share, payable on October 10, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, the Board of Directors at Omnicom, listed under NYSE as OMC, announced a quarterly dividend of 70 cents for each outstanding share of the company's common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be distributed on October 10, 2025, to all Omnicom common shareholders listed on the records at the end of...

data.title: Savers Value Village releasing Q2 FY2025 results on July 31, 2025 with conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET. Dial +1 800 549 8228 to join.
data.description: A company based in Bellevue, Washington, Savers Value Village, Inc., has revealed its intention to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of the year on July 31, 2025, post the market closing. The announcement will be followed by a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes. Interested investors and analysts can join the conversation by calling +1 800 549 8228 (for international participants, dial +1 289 819 1520) roughly 10 minutes before the scheduled commencement of the call.

data.title: FIGS (NYSE: FIGS) to release Q2 2025 financial results on August 7, after US markets close. Conference call at 2:00pm PT / 5pm ET.
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, FIGS, Inc., a top healthcare apparel brand, is set to reveal its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on August 7, 2025, following the close of U.S. markets. A conference call will be held by FIGS management at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the financial performance and future prospects of the company. Ahead of the call, FIGS intends to release a detailed report on its second quarter performance. FIGS is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol FIGS.

data.title: Fortune Brands appoints John Lee as EVP, Chief Digital and Innovation Officer to reflect growth opportunities and strategy.
data.description: Fortune Brands Innovations, Inc. disclosed alterations in essential leadership positions to align with growth strategies. John Lee is appointed as the Executive VP and Chief Digital & Innovation Officer. The company is focused on enhancing lives through home, security, and digital products, trading on NYSE under FBIN. This move signifies their emphasis on innovation and opportunity optimization.

data.title: BARK Inc. (NYSE: BARK) will announce Q1 FY26 results on August 7, 2025, in a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: In New York, BARK, Inc. (NYSE: BARK), a prominent omnichannel brand dedicated to canine happiness, disclosed plans to release its Q1 fiscal year 2026 financial results on August 7, 2025, before the market opens. A live conference call and webcast to address the results are scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. To participate in the call, dial 1-888-596-4144 if you are in the U.S.

data.title: Amazon.com will webcast its Q2 2025 financial results conference call on July 31, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET.
data.description: Amazon.com, Inc. revealed plans for a conference call to review its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. The call is scheduled for Thursday, July 31, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET. The discussion will be webcast live with the audio and presentation slides accessible for a minimum of three months following the event on the company's Investor Relations website at www.amazon.com/ir.

data.title: BlackSky plans to offer $125 million in convertible senior notes due 2033 in a private offering.
data.description: Herndon, Virginia – BlackSky Technology Inc. disclosed plans to offer $125 million principal amount of Convertible Senior Notes due 2033 in a private offering to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. The announcement by BlackSky (NYSE: BKSY) also mentioned that the offering is subject to market conditions and other factors.
